message:
fix(newproj): use display name for tech stack in confirmation screen

The confirmation screen was correctly calling get_tech_option_display()
to get user-friendly names like "Node.js" instead of keys like "nodejs",
but then discarding the result and using the key anyway.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -140,7 +140,7 @@ render_confirmation_screen() {
         for tech in $tech_stack; do
             local name
             name=$(get_tech_option_display "$tech" 2>/dev/null || echo "$tech")
-            display_tech+="$tech, "
+            display_tech+="$name, "
         done
         display_tech="${display_tech%, }"
         echo -e "  Tech:       ${TUI_CYAN}$display_tech${TUI_NC}"
